evals.description: @future cannot be called from Queueable or Batch Apex
evals.question: A developer has a Queueable Apex class and wants to call an @future method from inside its execute() method. What happens at runtime, and what is the correct alternative?
must_contain: cannot be called from a future or batch method

evals.description: Queueable can only enqueue 1 child job per execute() in production
evals.question: A Queueable's execute() method calls System.enqueueJob() twice in the same execution in a production org. What is the result?
must_contain: Too many queueable jobs added to the queue

evals.description: EventBus.publish() publishes only if the transaction commits
evals.question: A developer calls EventBus.publish() followed by a DML insert that throws a DmlException. Is the Platform Event published? Why or why not?

evals.description: CDC ChangeEventHeader.changeType uses CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE/UNDELETE, not insert/update/delete
evals.question: A developer writes `if (header.changeType == 'update')` in a CDC trigger subscriber to detect record updates. The code compiles but never executes. What is wrong?

evals.description: CDC changedFields only contains the fields that actually changed; all others are null on UPDATE events
evals.question: A CDC trigger subscriber reads `event.Phone` on an UPDATE AccountChangeEvent. The account has a phone number in the database, but `event.Phone` is null. Why?

evals.description: Platform Event ReplayId -1 replays all retained events; -2 subscribes to new events only
evals.question: A CometD subscriber wants to receive all Platform Events published in the last 72 hours when it first connects. What ReplayId should it use, and what does ReplayId = -2 do instead?

evals.description: Schedulable Apex minimum scheduling interval is 1 minute
evals.question: A developer wants to run a Scheduled Apex job every 30 seconds. Is this possible with System.schedule()? What is the minimum scheduling interval, and what is the alternative for sub-minute frequency?

evals.description: System.enqueueJob from a trigger is limited to 1 per trigger execution in synchronous context
evals.question: An after-insert trigger on Account iterates Trigger.new and calls System.enqueueJob() inside the loop. When 5 accounts are inserted at once, what exception is thrown and why?

evals.description: Transaction Finalizer is the only built-in way to handle Queueable failure
evals.question: A Queueable job throws an unhandled exception in its execute() method. The developer wants to retry the job and log the error. What built-in Apex mechanism supports this, and how is it registered?

evals.description: Continuation is only valid in @AuraEnabled and Visualforce controller methods
evals.question: A developer tries to use the Continuation class inside a Queueable execute() method to make a long-running HTTP callout. What happens, and where is Continuation actually supported?

evals.description: Platform Event delivery order is guaranteed within a partition but not across partitions
evals.question: A developer relies on Platform Events being delivered in the exact order they were published. High-volume Platform Events are used. What is the ordering guarantee and what additional design is needed to ensure ordered processing?

evals.description: Database.AllowsCallouts enables HTTP callouts in Queueable but per-callout 10s timeout still applies
evals.question: A Queueable implements Database.AllowsCallouts and calls Http.send() five times. Each external call takes 15 seconds to respond. What happens?
